Hero.title: Input Components
Hero.subtitle: Inputs loaded from XML, parsed with xmltodict, and returned as JSON.

Input.label: Normal Input
Input.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

Input.label: Number Input
Input.description: This input only accepts numeric values.

Input.label: Password Input
Input.description: This input hides the entered text.

Input.label: Textarea Input
Input.description: This input allows for longer text entries.

Textarea.label: Standalone Textarea
Textarea.description: This is a standalone textarea without save actions.

Input.label: Date Input
Input.description: Select a date from the calendar.

Input.label: Datetime Input
Input.description: Select a date and time from the calendar.

Switch.label: Switch Input
Switch.description: Toggle this setting on or off.

Checkbox.label: Checkbox Input
Checkbox.description: Select this option if you agree.
